name: oura
description: Reads Oura API v2 usercollection profile, daily summary, time-series, sleep, tag, workout, session, and device-configuration data.

risk.read: external Oura API read of personal wellness and health data, including profile, sleep, activity, readiness, heart-rate, tags, workouts, sessions, and device configuration
risk.approval: none; this bundle is read-only and excludes app-level webhook subscription mutations
